title: Goat Drops│山羊掉落物
description: Goat will drop Mutton when killed.│山羊被擊殺時會掉落羊肉。
body:
# Function│功能
Goat will drop 0-2 Raw Mutton when killed, drops Cooked Mutton if dying while on fire, and each level of Looting enchantment on the weapon will increase the drop limit by 1.│山羊被擊殺後會掉落0-2塊生羊肉，在著火時死亡則掉落烤羊肉，武器上的每一級掠奪附魔會使掉落數量的上限+1。
